message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>The recent outbreak of the Covid-19 suggests a rather long latent phase that precludes public health officials to predict the pandemic transmission on time. Here we apply mass action laws and chemical transition theory to propose a kinetic model that accounts for viral transmission dynamics at the latent phase. This model is useful for authorities to make early preventions and control measurements that stop the spread of a deadly new virus.</jats:p>
title: Applying chemical reaction transition theory to predict the latent transmission dynamics of coronavirus outbreak in China
